flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at California State University-Los Angeles rose 25% between 2007 and 2010 ($5.5k → $6.9k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at California State University-Los Angeles rose 131% between 2021 and 2024 (11.0% → 25.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at California State University-Los Angeles fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).
